title: WF Graham Criss Cross Crossword Puzzle Book - Spiral Bound Brain Teasers Travel Puzzles Book with over 300 Puzzles, (4165)
features: Keep your mind sharp and test your word skills with one of these handy, fun-filled criss cross word puzzle books for adults and teens
Figure out which words fit where to fill in the crosswords and solve the puzzles
At only 22x18cm, these adult puzzle books are small enough to be used as a travel puzzle to take away with you on holiday. One puzzlebook will keep you amused for hours!
Filled to the brim with over 300 criss cross puzzles, each crisscross game brain teaser will keep your mind occupied and entertained
These criss cross puzzle books are spiral-bound and printed on high-quality paper
Colours and series numbers may vary - designs are sent at random
